living-abstract.essence: Quest-driven PM framework with RPG narrative layer
living-abstract.purpose: Transform work into adventure through structured hierarchy and progressive discovery
living-abstract.capacity: Create campaigns, quests, missions with proper scaffolding
Map active work, find priorities, track states
Preserve completed/abandoned work with intel intact
Run missions through orchestrated round cycles
living-abstract.principle: Exploration over planning - lift fog progressively
Strategy flows DOWN (briefings), wisdom flows UP (debriefs)
Each level has perfect briefing, no more no less
Main context PRECIOUS, worker Task() context disposable
